indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook in this space.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: soft seating furniture
indicators.rationale: A large bathtub takes up the majority of the space, leaving no usable cooking workspace.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: no visible cooking utensils or tools
indicators.rationale: There are no visible cooking utensils or tools, which are essential for cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for cooking (Daily). There are no cooking appliances, no sink, no hard prep surfaces, and no visible cooking utensils or tools. The large bathtub takes up the majority of the space, leaving no usable cooking workspace. The space is completely unsuitable for any cooking activity and receives the minimum score of 1.
